{{Quote|Four-Eighteen and Four-Twenty are down.|A stormtrooper, reporting to Imperial Intelligence's agent Kirtan Loor|<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />}}
'''Four-Eighteen''' was the designation of a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who served in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the Galactic Empire.<ref name="Rogue Squadron" /> In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> the individual was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a booby-trap left by [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic forces]] shortly after a [[Raid on Talasea|raid]] intended to eliminate [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], an elite New Republic [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]], on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Talasea]]. Four-Eighteen's death, along with the death of fellow stormtrooper [[Four-Twenty]], were later reported to [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence's]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]] [[Kirtan Loor]].<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />

==Behind the scenes==
The stormtrooper was first mentioned in the [[1996]] novel ''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'', the first book in the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] novel series written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]].<ref name="Rogue Squadron" />
